completed_tasks.name: Parity decomposition: M_odd neg def, M_even Lorentzian
Cauchy structure confirmed, Connes bridge established

remaining_tasks.name: Write up Lorentzian Weil Matrix conjecture as formal document
Attack conjecture using matrix analysis (Loewner, interlacing, concentration)

decisions.decision: Formulated Lorentzian Weil Matrix Conjecture as clean RH reduction
decisions.rationale: Strips number theory from RH, exposes matrix skeleton: M has at most 1 positive eigenvalue, M_odd<0, positive eigvec in even/range(W02). Verified lambda^2=10-50000.
ESPRIT detects but can't prove. Displacement rank 2 trivial for Hankel. Palindromic needs few-freq signal. These are ruled out as proof paths.

decisions.decision: Option C (Levinson-Conrey/GUE/Rodgers-Tao) held in back pocket
decisions.rationale: User directive: chase Connes first, keep alternatives ready

next_action: Session 61: Create docs/lorentzian_weil_conjecture.tex — formal write-up of the conjecture with definitions, evidence, proof that (i)-(iii) implies RH, connections to Huh-Branden and Connes arXiv:2511.22755.
context_notes: Seven sessions in one afternoon (54-60). Went from 'everything is circular' to a clean conjecture that reduces RH to matrix theory on Cauchy-Loewner matrices. The conjecture has three parts: (i) M Lorentzian, (ii) M_odd neg def, (iii) positive eigvec even. The 10^{-7} barrier on M_odd (Session 58) is the single tightest point. User wants Session 61 = write-up, Session 62 = matrix analysis attack. User feedback: stop saying 'honest', the work IS honest by default.
